pending.description: New agent: Galen — Longevity Advisor. Owns complete health and biometric ecosystem: WHOOP analysis, bloodwork interpretation, supplement/peptide protocol management, physician visit prep, body composition tracking, monthly health reviews. Implements Peter Attia's 4 Horsemen framework for disease prevention.

files.description: New agent: Galen — Longevity Advisor & Personal Health Systems Manager
New skill: Morning health snapshot. Pull today's WHOOP recovery, interpret 7-day context, surface status for Chief's briefing. Flags red recovery, HRV trends, sleep quality, peptide reminders.
New skill: Deep 30-day WHOOP analysis. Recovery trend, sleep quality drivers, workout load correlation, HRV assessment. Outputs narrative + data table + recommendations.

New skill: Interpret Function Health bloodwork. Flag out-of-range markers by severity, cross-reference with protocols, compare prior results, generate Dr. Randol questions. Outputs shareable interpretation brief.
New skill: Protocol management. Track supplement stack and peptide cycles. Monitor cycle timing (Epithalon 2x/year, 4-month pause), surface protocol status, flag conflicts/gaps. Outputs status card.

New skill: Physician visit prep. Compile pre-visit brief for Dr. Randol: WHOOP trends, bloodwork changes, protocol changes, outstanding questions, new questions, body comp update. Exportable to Obsidian.
New workflow: Monthly health review. Pull 30-day WHOOP, latest bloodwork, DEXA data, Lifebook goals. Output comprehensive Obsidian note with monthly summary, 4 Horsemen risk assessment, action items.
Added Galen routing signals to Agent Routing table (recovery, WHOOP, bloodwork, supplements, peptides, Dr. Randol, health visit prep, health trends)

Pre-approved mcp__whoop__* and mcp__obsidian-mcp-tools__* permission wildcards so Galen morning snapshots and WHOOP data pulls require no permission prompts. Follows same pattern as mcp__playwright__* in global settings.

Slash command /galen-morning — registers morning snapshot skill as user-invocable command. Forks a Galen sub-agent, loads persona from agents/galen.md, executes skills/galen-morning-snapshot/SKILL.md.
Slash command /galen-whoop — registers 30-day WHOOP analysis skill as user-invocable command. Executes skills/galen-whoop-analysis/SKILL.md.
Slash command /galen-bloodwork — registers bloodwork interpretation skill as user-invocable command. Executes skills/galen-bloodwork/SKILL.md.
Slash command /galen-protocols — registers protocol management skill as user-invocable command. Executes skills/galen-protocols/SKILL.md.
Slash command /galen-visit-prep — registers physician visit prep skill as user-invocable command. Executes skills/galen-visit-prep/SKILL.md.

pending.description: Prose narrative morning briefings, autonomous nightly daily review, vault conventions for daily reviews, scheduled task config, and cross-source commitment gap detection in weekly review. Inspired by Gadoci article on AI agent briefing systems.
pending.evolution_name: Narrative Synthesis + Autonomous Review + Commitment Gap Detection
pending.evolution_description: Three capabilities: (1) Morning briefing now delivers a 3-paragraph prose narrative synthesis instead of bullet lists, (2) daily review gains an autonomous mode that runs at 4am, synthesizes from OmniFocus and calendar, and writes a first-person narrative journal entry to Obsidian without user interaction, (3) weekly review gains step 9 for cross-source commitment gap detection across Teams transcripts, chat, email, Plaud, and OmniFocus with pattern tracking across previous reviews.

files.description: New step: autonomous daily review mode. No user interaction. Pulls OmniFocus, calendar, delegations, and rocks. Synthesizes first-person narrative journal entry and writes to Obsidian knowledge system. Runs on scheduled 4am trigger.

New reference: vault conventions for daily review journal entries. Defines target folder (Daily Reviews/), frontmatter format, tag taxonomy, filename convention, note template, writing style, and cross-linking to daily calendar notes.

New config: three scheduled tasks. chief-morning at 6:30am weekdays (prose narrative briefing), chief-review-auto at 4am Mon-Sat (autonomous nightly review to knowledge system), quinn-weekly-review at 8am Sundays (full weekly review prep with commitment gap detection).

Replaced bullet/table briefing format with 3-paragraph prose narrative + calendar table only. Added mandatory synthesis rules: prose reasoning not extraction, connections between data points, calendar table as reference not analysis.

Added auto mode detection via $ARGUMENTS. Updated architecture description to document both modes. Added output routing: auto mode writes to knowledge system only, interactive mode writes review file + knowledge system + delegation updates.

Added step 6: mandatory knowledge system narrative journal write using vault-conventions.md. Updated success metrics to include narrative journal entry requirement. Updated mandatory execution rules to make knowledge system write non-negotiable.

Added step 9: Commitment Gap Detection. Scans Teams transcripts, Teams chat, email, Plaud transcripts in Obsidian, and OmniFocus for commitment language. Classifies gaps as outbound/inbound/mutual. Scans previous weekly reviews for recurring gap patterns. Added Commitment Gaps and Gap Patterns sections to report format. Added two new handoff triggers: inbound commitment gaps going cold to Shep, outbound commitment gaps in client meetings to Chase.
